items.title: I Cut Them Off, They Begged(Dubbed)
items.desc: Sophia Lewis cared for houseguest Lily Miller for a year, only to be betrayed by Lily's twisted diary that ruined her reputation and led to her death. Reborn, Sophia refuses Lily's exploitation, exposes her lies, and strikes back when Lily accuses her again on exam results day.

episode_info.name: I Cut Them Off, They Begged(Dubbed)

items.title: Fake Heiress, Real Love
items.desc: Lin Wu, raised under strict rules, was married to Lu Chen for family gain. After three loveless years, the real daughter Lin Shuyao appeared—Lin Wu was switched at birth. Her family demanded a divorce within a month. Finally free, Lin Wu revealed her true self, winning Lu Chen's heart.

items.title: I Write My Own Fate
items.desc: Emma Lee wakes as the betrayed heroine of an ancient romance novel! Her husband Oliver Smith abandons her to marry another. Refusing to be helpless, she uses wit and courage to rewrite her fate, break women's chains, and navigate love and intrigue, forging her own legendary path.

items.title: Ashes Burn, She Rises
items.desc: For six years, Sophia's daughter was forbidden from calling Noah Wright "Daddy," while his first love's son was groomed as heir. After being reborn, she divorces immediately, rebuilds her career to its former glory, and starts a happy life with her daughter—leaving her ex drowning in regret.

items.title: Stockholm Boys
items.desc: Under the shadow of a family feud, Axel and Elias wield love as their weapon, teetering on the edge of revenge and redemption, ultimately igniting an unbreakable love forged through shared pain and obsession.

items.title: No Love, Only Empire
items.desc: Time-traveler Princess Su Yuci spends ten years building her husband Jiang Chenyuan into a business tycoon and donates her kidney to him. He betrays her with his mistress and illegitimate son at her sister's engagement party. She orchestrates his downfall and returns to her era victorious.

items.title: My Mafia Pilot Boyfriend
items.desc: Tony Baker, a debt-ridden flight attendant, unexpectedly matches with Ryan Rossi, his charming but secretive pilot crush, on Grindr. Their whirlwind romance blossoms amidst the high-flying glamour of airline life, but Tony soon discovers Ryan's dark secret: he's the heir to a powerful mafia family, smuggling drugs under the guise of his prestigious career. As Tony unravels Ryan's dangerous double life, their forbidden love story intertwines with a thrilling investigation, forcing them to navigate workplace politics, deadly rivals, and the ever-present threat of exposure. Will their love survive the turbulent skies of their dangerous lives?

items.title: Dumping the Racing Star
items.desc: Heiress Camille's marriage to racer Maddox turns tragic when manipulative agent Avery convinces him she is unfaithful, leading to the loss of their child due to his coldness. After their divorce, Camille reclaims her position and teams with her brother Knox to destroy her enemies.

items.title: Fated to the Cursed Alpha
items.desc: Under a full moon, Jay-La and Nathan's bond draws an evil witch who wants Nathan. Can true love overcome the darkest magic?

items.title: I Cut Them Off, They Begged
items.desc: Sophia Lewis cared for houseguest Lily Miller for a year, only to be betrayed by Lily's twisted diary that ruined her reputation and led to her death. Reborn, Sophia refuses Lily's exploitation, exposes her lies, and strikes back when Lily accuses her again on exam results day.
